pi_items.source: Task instruction file and setup script (which cleans up the file at this exact location)
Downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf from official Subsurface repository and confirmed presence of dives with location 'Yellow House' forming a trip
Downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf from official Subsurface repository and confirmed presence of another trip/location named 'Sund Rock' which should be excluded

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting only a specific trip from a real dive dataset (SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repository). Inspection of the dataset confirms it includes dives for a 'Yellow House' location (which must be exported) and a 'Sund Rock' location (which must be excluded). The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/yellow_house_report.tex.
